TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tapowaray, title = Tapowaray, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tapowaray} }

S.FORM: alang Tapowaray (Saranawan, 大俱來部落) ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Nakahama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 124 buwan, 347 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 323 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 24 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 89%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tapowaray hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Tapowaray hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Tapowaray hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tapowaray hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tapowaray hya' ga Cikadaan. tay mkyahu' na Tapowaray hya' ga Sadipongan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan alang Tapowaray ga ungat pqwasan biru. khu skwan biru maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Tapowaray (Saranawan, 大俱來部落) ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Nakahama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 124 buwan, 347 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 323 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 24 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 89%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tapowaray hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Tapowaray hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Tapowaray hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tapowaray hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tapowaray hya' ga Cikadaan. tay mkyahu' na Tapowaray hya' ga Sadipongan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan alang Tapowaray ga ungat pqwasan biru. khu skwan biru maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tapowaraj (s~ɕaranawan, *****) ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu nakaħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tapowaraj ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na tapowaraj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na tapowaraj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tapowaraj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tapowaraj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨika*aan. taj mkjaħuʔ na tapowaraj ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕa*ipoŋan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan alaŋ tapowaraj ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. kħu s~ɕkwan βiru maki * kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
